description: Schema enrichment (CNPJ, CPF, address, specialties) and public search endpoints with specialty/city filters for the Medicano platform

context.dependencies: Sprint 02 (RBAC) and Sprint 04 (Subscriptions) must be complete

prompts.name: specialty-enum-and-address-schema
prompts.description: Create the Specialty enum and the shared Address subdocument schema and DTO
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing enum, schema, or DTO. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/common/enums/specialty.enum.ts:
- export enum Specialty { MEDICINE = 'medicine', PSYCHOLOGY = 'psychology', PSYCHIATRY = 'psychiatry', DENTISTRY = 'dentistry', NUTRITION = 'nutrition' }

Create apps/api/src/common/schemas/address.schema.ts:
- @Schema({ _id: false }) class Address with fields:
  - street: string (required)
  - number: string (required)
  - complement?: string
  - neighborhood: string (required)
  - city: string (required)
  - state: string (required, length 2)
  - zipCode: string (required, 8 digits)
- export AddressSchema = SchemaFactory.createForClass(Address)
- This is a subdocument — do NOT register it as a top-level model

Create apps/api/src/common/dto/address.dto.ts:
- class AddressDto with class-validator decorators:
  - @IsString @IsNotEmpty street: string
  - @IsString @IsNotEmpty number: string
  - @IsString @IsOptional complement?: string
  - @IsString @IsNotEmpty neighborhood: string
  - @IsString @IsNotEmpty city: string
  - @IsString @Length(2, 2) state: string
  - @IsString @Matches(/^\d{8}$/) zipCode: string

If any file already exists with the correct content, make no changes.

prompts.name: enrich-clinic-schema
prompts.description: Add cnpj, specialties, address, phone, description fields to Clinic schema and update DTOs

prompts.name: enrich-professional-schema
prompts.description: Add cpf, registration, address, phone, description fields to Professional schema and update DTOs

prompts.name: search-module
prompts.description: Create the public search module with specialty and city filters
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files if any. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

The following already exist — import them:
- Specialty enum at apps/api/src/common/enums/specialty.enum.ts
- Clinic schema at apps/api/src/clinics/schemas/clinic.schema.ts
- Professional schema at apps/api/src/professionals/schemas/professional.schema.ts
- ParseMongoIdPipe at apps/api/src/common/pipes/parse-mongo-id.pipe.ts

Create apps/api/src/search/dto/search-query.dto.ts:
- class SearchQueryDto with class-validator and class-transformer:
  - @IsEnum(Specialty) @IsOptional specialty?: Specialty
  - @IsString @IsOptional city?: string
  - @IsIn(['clinic', 'professional', 'all']) @IsOptional type?: 'clinic' | 'professional' | 'all'
  - @Type(() => Number) @IsInt @Min(1) @IsOptional page?: number
  - @Type(() => Number) @IsInt @Min(1) @Max(50) @IsOptional limit?: number

Create apps/api/src/search/search.service.ts:
- @Injectable class SearchService
- constructor injects:
  - @InjectModel(Clinic.name) clinicModel: Model<ClinicDocument>
  - @InjectModel(Professional.name) professionalModel: Model<ProfessionalDocument>
- search(query: SearchQueryDto): Promise<SearchResult>
  - const page = query.page ?? 1
  - const limit = query.limit ?? 20
  - const skip = (page - 1) * limit
  - Build clinic filter: if specialty → { specialties: specialty }; if city → { 'address.city': city }
  - Build professional filter: if specialty → { specialty }; if city → { 'address.city': city }
  - if type === 'clinic' or 'all': fetch clinics with skip/limit
  - if type === 'professional' or 'all': fetch professionals with skip/limit
  - Add TODO comment: '// TODO (Sprint 09): when professional subscriptions are added, filter by active plan (RN20)'
  - return { clinics, professionals, total: clinics.length + professionals.length, page, limit }
- findClinicById(id: string): Promise<ClinicDocument>
  - Validate ObjectId; throw NotFoundException if not found
- findProfessionalById(id: string): Promise<ProfessionalDocument>
  - Validate ObjectId; throw NotFoundException if not found

Create apps/api/src/search/search.controller.ts:
- @Controller('search') — NO @UseGuards (public endpoints)
- GET / → search(@Query() query: SearchQueryDto)
- GET /clinics/:id → findClinicById(@Param('id', ParseMongoIdPipe))
- GET /professionals/:id → findProfessionalById(@Param('id', ParseMongoIdPipe))

Create apps/api/src/search/search.module.ts:
- Import MongooseModule.forFeature([{ name: Clinic.name, schema: ClinicSchema }, { name: Professional.name, schema: ProfessionalSchema }])
- Provide SearchService
- Controllers: [SearchController]

prompts.name: search-tests
prompts.description: Unit tests for SearchService covering filters, pagination and not-found cases
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the file if it exists. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Create apps/api/src/search/tests/search.service.spec.ts:
- Mock clinicModel and professionalModel using getModelToken
- Mock chained query: model.find().skip().limit().exec() returns array
- afterEach(() => jest.clearAllMocks())

Tests:
- 'search — no filters returns all clinics and professionals'
- 'search — by specialty filters correctly'
- 'search — by city filters by address.city'
- 'search — by specialty + city combines both filters'
- 'search — type=clinic returns only clinics, professionals empty'
- 'search — type=professional returns only professionals, clinics empty'
- 'search — pagination respects page and limit (page=2, limit=10 → skip=10)'
- 'findClinicById — found returns clinic'
- 'findClinicById — not found throws NotFoundException'
- 'findProfessionalById — found returns professional'
- 'findProfessionalById — not found throws NotFoundException'

prompts.name: register-search-and-update-types
prompts.description: Register SearchModule in app and update shared types package
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Update apps/api/src/app.module.ts:
- Import SearchModule from './search/search.module'
- Add SearchModule to imports array

Update packages/types/src/auth.ts:
- Update IClinic interface to include: cnpj: string, specialties: string[], address: IAddress, phone?: string, description?: string
- Update IProfessional interface to include: cpf: string, registration: string, address: IAddress, phone?: string, description?: string
- Add IAddress interface: street, number, complement?, neighborhood, city, state, zipCode

Create packages/types/src/search.ts:
- export interface ISearchQuery { specialty?: string; city?: string; type?: 'clinic' | 'professional' | 'all'; page?: number; limit?: number }
- export interface ISearchResult { clinics: IClinic[]; professionals: IProfessional[]; total: number; page: number; limit: number }
- Import IClinic and IProfessional from './auth'

Update packages/types/src/index.ts:
- Add: export * from './search';
